title: Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM)
summary: A probabilistic model that represents a distribution as a mixture of Gaussian distributions. It sits inside Statistical Models / Probabilistic Models. Start after Gaussian Mixture Model and Gaussian Mixture Models.
